DO NOT go past the room avec three Shadows et one Trésor Chest, otherwise, you will be locked into a story event et you won’t be able to grind anymore. Pass on Eiha et Zio; The number of skills you are able to pass down to a new Persona when fusing depends on the level of the Personas used. A level 1 Arsene fused avec a level 2 Pixie will only net one inherit skill slot. So if you are not able to pass both Eiha et Zio in this case its because you are slightly underlevel. Farming for levels is not required unless the guide says that you need a specific skill obtained at a specific level If there is only one slot available its recommended to inherit Eiha since Agathion will learn Zio at level 7, et Pixie also has Zio from the start. The key to combat is having access to as many elements as possible Fool Rang 2; This is a very difficult Palais because it’s so early in le jeu that we don’t have access to Personas, skills, or items to help us out, but we still need to Finir it in one day otherwise we won’t be able to get everything in one playthrough. Keep multiple saves just to be safe et use the SP items bought from the Distributeurs; This Palais features a puzzle where you need to find books in small rooms adjacent to a big Bibliothèque et then fit the books on the right shelves. The northern shelf that has books about the feats of Kamoshida is where you put the King Book. The eastern shelf that talks about girls in the volleyball team is the place for the Queen Book. Et finally, the eastern shelf is where the Slave Book goes. After all the books are in place, a new path will open up; Will Seeds are a new mechanic in Royal, there are 3 seeds to collect in every Palais. When all 3 are collected, they will turn into an accessory that gives a powerful skill to the person that uses it. They also recover a bit of SP every time one is collected, which is an huge deal in the early game; Red Seed: it’s part of the tutorial, your teammates will tell you to go get it; Once you reach the roof, the enemies will become quite strong. It's recommended to skip all the battles until you are inside the castle again. When the Trésor is found, you can farm as much as you like, but for now, focus on reaching the end of the Palais; Green Seed: When you are using the grappling hook to climb the outside of the tower, the Seed will be at the very top. Entrer the first window et crawl inside a vent to reach a higher area where you can use the grappling hook to get higher; Blue Seed: Back inside the castle, when the rooms start to shift, take the elevator down. You will see another elevator in the new area that can't be used. Continue through Kamoshida’s painting to Débloquer a shortcut to the very beginning of the Palais. Explore this area to find a lever that activates the other elevator. Go back through the painting et use the new elevator that we just activated to go down to a new area et fight the first Will Seed Guardian; Reach the Trésor et farm until you are level 9 avec 20.000 yen; Fuse Silky et Agathion to get Berith (Hierophant, 9); If you don't know who Silky is, the Shadow name can be found in the Shadows Information; Leave the Palais after securing the route to the Trésor, fusing Berith, et getting the necessary money; When you are ready to leave, make sure you have a Lovers Personas; Almost every Sunday, you can Vérifier la télé et Acheter unique or rare items from the Shopping Program. Some of them are useful, others aren’t. This schedule was designed to have the money to Acheter from the Shopping Program every time; There are always two options to choose from, et you can only pick one Today, the bundles are Spring Awake Set: 10 items that cure Dormir et 10 that cure dizzy, as well as a Dormir Immunity accessory OR Share of Spring Set, 5 items that heal 10 SP each, 1 item that heals 40 HP to all allies, et 1 item that heals 80 HP to all allies. It's recommended to Acheter the Share of Spring Set . SP is too valuable in the early game Parler avec Sojiro; Got it (+3); Hierophant Rang 1.

2026-05-25.daytime: Steal Madarame’s Heart; Before starting the fight make sure Joker has all basic elemental attacks (fire, ice, elec, et wind) et they can’t be the ones that hit all targets, they need to be single target; Boss Ichiryusai Azazel Madarame: Madarame is one of the hardest bosses in le jeu if not the hardest, et that's for one simple reason, he can hit all your party members' weaknesses in one turn, essentially killing everyone from full HP. The Eyes drain elemental attacks et can cast all basic elemental spells, the Mouth drains physical attacks et attacks normally, et the Nose has Tarukaja et Rakunda. The best way to deal avec the first phase is to use Rakunda in the Eyes et have Ryuji et Yusuke use AoE physical attacks (Yusuke needs to be level 18 to learn it) to neutralize the Eyes as soon as possible, avec the Eyes out of the picture the Boss gets a lot easier. In the second phase, Madarame starts summoning his elemental clones, et as you can expect, they are weak to their opposite element. Use ice against the red clones et fire against the blue, use wind against the yellow clones et elec against the green. Abuse Baton Pass by exploiting all the clones' weaknesses et kill them all in one turn. Just make sure you don’t use any spells that hit all targets because the clones will reflect their element back at you. The beginning of the second phase is a battle of attrition. Don't worry about Madarame, just make sure the clones die. Eventually, the clones will start getting weaker et easier to kill, then you can start getting some damage in Madarame himself; Magician Rang 3; Lire le livre The Gallant Rogue (8/46) Courage +3; Fool Rang 4.

2026-06-02.daytime: Explore Mémento; You have 2 requests If you find any locked chests don’t use the lock picks on them; Aller à the new area that Débloqué, Aiyatsbus, et find Jose. On the stairs of every floor in Mémento, Jose will put Stamps for you to collect. They can also appear at random on every floor et not only on the stairs. Jose will offer bonuses based on the amount of Stamps collected. Make sure to always collect all the Stamps in every visit to Mémento et prioritize raising the items buff to maximum before anything else; Apart from the Stamps, Jose will also ask you to collect Flowers. They Travailler as a type of currency that you can exchange avec him for items. Flowers can be found all across Mémento et you can collect them as you drive by Jose has a random chance of appearing every time you Entrer a floor. If you want him to appear you can go up et down between two floors until it happens There are 2 Stamps in the previous area so backtrack to get those Sometimes when you get down to another area there may be an ATM to loot for tons of Objets de récupération de PC. The ATM appears at random et can give from x6 items up to x12 items at once Once you are done avec the 2 requests et have gotten all the Stamps, go back to l'entrée et Entrer the Chambre de Velours; Fuse Angel et Cait Sith to get Eligor (Emperor, 16); Fuse Apsaras et Succubus to get Orobas (Hierophant, 17); In Advanced Fusion, fuse Berith, Eligor, et Orobas to get Flauros (Devil, 19), pass on Tarukaja; Parler avec the Twins for Strength Rang 3; Find Jose et spend the 10 Stamps (2 from Quimranut et 8 from Aiyatsbus) to get Items to x6. Spend all your flowers too; You can see all the items Jose sells at Jose's Fleuriste When you leave Mémento you will loose any Flowers you did not spend Farm until you are level 21. This is your last chance to farm 100.000 yen, this amount will be needed by the end of this month. Keep in mind that you will also need more than 100.000 because there are still day-to-day purchases to make. You will be safe getting 250.000 yen total; Trésor Demons have a higher chance to appear because of the Pollen Warning. They give around 300xp et 6.000 yen If you don't feel like farming all that money, make a save et leave Mémento. On the next day Aller à the Airsoft Boutique et sell all the loot, if it brings you to the required amount you can keep going, if not, reload le jeu et farm a bit more Once you are done farming et are ready to leave, make sure to have a Councilor, Temperance, Chariot, Lovers, et Hierophant Personas; TV Game Show: ("Probation officers are unpaid”) Connaissance +1; Use the DVD in votre chambre to Regarder Not-so-hot Betsy (5/12) Charme +2.

Interagir avec the coffins again et turn the globes on et off accordingly; Green Seed: after activating the first blue orbs puzzle you will be able to climb the large rolling balls. From the top of the balls, you can access a platform avec another puzzle code, R01100 et B10011. Set up the new code in the holograms et press the button again to open a new door in that same room. This new door leads to the Will Seed ; Blue Seed: when you reach the area on top of the big pharaoh-like statues, use the grappling hook to access floating platforms, this is the normal progression path. A Persona can only be strenghtened once per day but there is a way to go around the system: strengthen a Persona et register it in the Compendium, after that dismiss it from your inventory. By summoning the same Persona again you will be able to strengthen it more. This method gives you infinite uses of the Gallows avec the same Persona on the same day as long as you have the money to keep dismissing et resummoning; Call Kawakami using the yellow phone et Requête a special massage; Passer du temps avec Chihaya. This will not be a Rang Up.

2026-12-24.daytime: Examen result Charme +3; Go back to Mémento Entrance; Voyage rapide vers the deepest part you can et go down; At any point during this area, you can go back to l'entrée et Parler avec the Twins to heal both HP et SP to full; There are two more Trésor Demons in this area. Hope Diamond can be found in Depths of Mémento et Crystal Skull when you go back to street level after talking avec Igor. You don't need to capture any of them now since we will come back to Mémento again, but if you see one make sure to capture it to reduce the grind later; Fool Rang 10; Refuse Igor's deal; Yaldabaoth, God of Control: this Boss looks more intimidating than he actually is. Keep him under Debilitate et keep your team buffed at all times. During the fight, he will summon 4 different weapons to fight avec him et they all have different HP pools as well as resistances. Information about these weapons can be viewed in the Special Enemies table. When a new weapon is summoned it should be taken care of as soon as possible since they all have their turns et attacks. Having all 4 weapons up at the same time means the Boss will have 5 attacks per turn et can kill you before you have a chance to react. This fight features unique status ailments that can be applied to your team. Overall, they don't do much. The worst ones can double the cost of skills, but that's it. Don't hold back on your items like Soma et other ones that can fully heal. It's important that you keep attacking to prevent the Boss from amassing his "army" of weapons. Close to the end of the fight, Yaldabaoth will summon all weapons at the same time et start charging up for a massive attack. When this happens, you have 1 turn to attack the weapons et kill as many as you can to reduce the damage of the upcoming attack. In the next turn, make sure to guard avec everyone.

2027-01-02.daytime: First Laboratory Infiltration; During this Infiltration you won't be able to freely explore, so just follow the path; Boss Warped Abyss: This fight can be very difficult because you can only use Joker et Akechi. The Boss has access to Concentrate, Maragudyne, et Vacuum Wave, so it's extremely important that you don't use a Persona that is weak to wind, preferably use one that is resistant or blocks it. He can also apply Fear et use Almighty skills. Joker will have to be on heal duty during the majority of the fight, leaving Akechi to do damage alone. This means that this battle can take a long time et you may even run out of SP before it ends. Use items when necessary et keep yourself at over half HP.

2027-01-09.daytime: Second Laboratory Infiltration; During this Infiltration, you won't be able to freely explore, so just follow the path. Refuse Maruki's deal; Boss Sumire Yoshizawa: you will be fighting this avec Joker alone. Sumire only has Bless et Physical Attacks, et she will start buffing herself quite early avec skills like Charge et Brave Steps. Avec her skill Sword Dance, there is a very high chance it will land a critical, especially if Brave Step is active. During this period, switch to a Persona that is resistant or immune to physical attacks. Using a Physical Ointment is also an option to mitigate the damage; Boss Cendrillon et Evil Synthetic Organism: you will fight the first few rounds avec only Joker et Akechi. During this phase, just worry about surviving. When your team arrives, use the first round to rearrange the party as you want. Cendrillon will use the Evil Synthetic Organisms to heal 600 HP every couple rounds. Make sure to kill them using Nuclear or Ice attacks. Chain Baton Passes et get the last person to hit Cendrillon for major damage.

2027-01-12.daytime: Third Laboratory Infiltration; Rebirth of the Faith Arcana. Now you can advance the Faith Confident to Rang 10; In this Palais, you will find the Ravenous Dragon as a Red Shadow. This enemy drops the Sooty Scale Armor that can turn into the best armor for Morgana when washed. Make sure to kill at least one of these enemies to get the item; Progress until you hit the blockade et fight the Boss; Boss The Shadowed One et Spear-Wielding General: the General is weak to Elec but there is a very high chance that the Shadowed One will cast Elec Wall to protect his weakness, the wall will be active for a few turns et get immediately put up again when it expires. Because of that, exploiting weaknesses in this fight is a luxury. The Shadowed One has no weaknesses et casts Mabufudyne, et the General has One-Shot Kill et Charge. This combination makes them very dangerous since they can trigger Technical Attacks by combining their skills. Status ailments don't have a high chance to Travailler but they can keep one of them out of the fight until you do some damage to the other. You can also trigger your own Technical Attack, knocking one down et Baton Pass for some extra damage.

2027-02-03.daytime: The Final Battle; Maruki et Azathoth: this is the first fight in a total of 3, back-to-back. During this phase, Maruki will be protected by Azathoth's tentacles et you can't hit him without dealing avec the tentacles first. When Maruki is defeated, this phase will end so you don't need to worry about Azathoth. The tentacles all have different resistances et weaknesses that will be covered in the Special Enemies section. Abuse Baton Passes by exploiting the tentacles' weaknesses et hit Maruki in the 4rd Pass. The Boss can cause Fear et Dizzy that should be healed as soon as possible, having Akechi in this fight is bad since he is weak to bless, one of the Boss' attacks; Maruki et Adam Kadmon: in the second phase you will be fighting Maruki "alone". Only he can be targeted et you should focus everything you have, your best skills et most powerful combos, because Maruki will grind you down if not dealt avec quickly. His skill Revitalize Soul deals a fixed 300 damage to everyone et heals Maruki by 1200, et Grand Palm leaves one person avec 1 HP despite their defenses, so you need to hit him quickly et hit him hard to end this phase as fast as possible. Use Charge et Concentrate as well as Debilitate to do as much damage per attack as you can; Adam Kadmon: phase three is the easiest. It is a scripted battle et all you have to do is resist for a few rounds until the cutscene starts. Keep healing, guarding, et debuffing the Boss' attack.
